subject: A dryad with long flowing hair and leafy garments, standing tensely in a moonlit forest, looking back over her shoulder as if startled
description: A slender dryad figure stands among dense forest undergrowth, her body turned slightly away while her head twists back toward the viewer with an alert, anxious expression. She wears leaf-textured organic garments that blend with the surrounding foliage. Pale moonlight or filtered daylight backlights her hair and the surrounding leaves, creating a soft rim glow against the deeper green darkness of the woods behind her. The composition is vertical and mid-shot, dominated by greens with cool blue-grey highlights.
foreground: dryad figure in leafy attire, surrounded by ferns and forest plants
background: dense forest with backlit foliage and shafts of pale light
emotion: anxious, startled, alert; body language suggests being caught off-guard mid-glance
